rationale: The citing paper references Winterich and Barone (2011) only in literature-review clusters and in a summary table of prior CMP studies. It uses the citation as one example of earlier work on donation-versus-discount or coupon outcomes in simplified settings, mainly to contrast prior designs with the paper's field-sales context. The citing paper does not build specific hypotheses from this study's identity mechanism, reuse its measures, or return to it in interpreting results, so the role is background rather than functionally central.
